organelles.role: charge separation and cyclic Si-S carrier regeneration
phosphino-silazane monomer synthesis and membrane strand welding
information polymer templating and segregation before division

design_notes: Envelope is treated as an amphiphilic ceramic-polymer network, not a lipid bilayer.
Transition-metal nodes act as both channel gates and electron-transport anchors.
Information polymer is modeled as a phosphino-silazane chain stabilized by Al/Fe scaffolding.
All scores and fluxes are heuristic outputs from a coarse-grained speculative model.
